name: Radiant Typhoon Fonix, the Great Flame
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>絢</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>嵐</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>らん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>豪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>火</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>か</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>フォニクス
desc: If a Quick-Play Spell Card is activated (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If a Quick-Play Spell Card is activated (except during the Damage Step): You can target up to 2 cards your opponent controls; shuffle them into the Deck. If "Mystical Space Typhoon" is activated while this card is in your GY: You can Special Summon this card. You can only use each effect of "Radiant Typhoon Fonix, the Great Flame" once per turn.

action: Returns from your opponent's field to your opponent's Deck
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
